## CheatReader v0.1.14

### Highlights
- Added adjustable line spacing and reading width controls for more comfortable long-session reading.
- Added configurable keyboard shortcuts for core reader actions.
- Added a boss-key style hide/restore action so the reader can disappear without losing your place.
- Refined the shortcut settings UI so it feels more compact and polished in the control panel.

### Notes
- Existing reading progress and bookshelf data continue to work as before.
- Shortcut changes are app-scoped and persist between launches.
